_meta.key_format: qname is the fully qualified field name from `fill inspect`; page_no is its 1-based page
comments: type='text': set_to is any string; apply writes /V (TextStringObject).
type='checkbox': set_to MUST equal the on_value (e.g. '/On' / '/Yes' / '/1') or off_value from `fill inspect`. Do NOT pass 'true' or 'checked'.
type='radio_group': set_to MUST equal one of radio_choices[].set_to from `fill inspect` (typically starts with '/').
type='choice': set_to MUST equal one of choice_options[].set_to from `fill inspect`.
Untouched fields are NOT listed — apply leaves them as-is.
qname comes from `fill inspect`; do not invent or shorten — apply rejects unknown qnames.
page_no is checked against inspect output; mismatches are rejected at apply time.
Before running `fill apply`, extract the apply-only payload:
jq '.writes | map({qname, page_no, set_to})' field_values.json > values.json

writes.source: <!-- DISAMBIG: this is travel-purpose's 'Other'; marital-status's 'Other' has qname 'marital.Other' on page 1 -->

missing_required.reason: Visual frame for photo paste. acroform_apply cannot fill — user must paste photo manually after printing.
Signature line. User must sign manually after printing (not a digital signature field).
Source documents don't contain home address. User must provide.

warnings: <!-- e.g. 'NAME field truncated from 22 to 19 chars due to maxlen=20' -->
